meta_title: For Freelancers: passive income to Solve stuck with basic apps (Beginner Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to passive income and overcome stuck with basic apps. A Beginner-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: stuck with basic apps

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Passive Income to Solve Basic App Limitations
content.seo_description: Break free from basic app limitations. Learn how to generate passive income as a freelancer using Antigravity and Claude Code in this expert-led checklist.
content.answer_block: Stop trading hours for dollars by building high-leverage micro-SaaS tools. By utilizing Antigravity for rapid scaffolding and Claude Code for iterative development, you can automate complex workflows, package them as premium digital assets, and generate recurring passive income while your competitors remain stuck building low-value, one-off basic applications.
content.intro:
You’re trapped in the 'Build-Deliver-Repeat' cycle, a treadmill of custom dev work that keeps your income tethered to your hourly output. Every client project feels like starting from zero, and your expertise is being burned on low-leverage tasks that never compound. The ceiling on your earnings is defined by your wakeful hours.

It’s time to flip the script. By shifting your focus toward autonomous AI-driven micro-SaaS, you can transform your technical skills into a scalable engine. Using Antigravity to architect the backbone and Claude Code to handle the heavy lifting, you will build assets that work while you sleep, finally breaking the dependency on manual labor.

steps.title: Identify High-Margin Micro-Problems
steps.description: Don't build another todo list. Use AI to scan niche forums for recurring technical pain points. Focus on workflow automation tools that save businesses time.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the following list of common freelancer pain points and suggest 3 high-leverage micro-SaaS ideas that solve these problems with minimal maintenance.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Research potential market gaps for [niche] and output a list of 5 profitable micro-SaaS ideas'

steps.title: Rapid Scaffolding with Antigravity
steps.description: Speed is your competitive advantage. Use Antigravity to generate the boilerplate code for your chosen micro-SaaS in seconds, not days.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a robust project structure for a [type of app] using Next.js, Tailwind CSS, and Supabase. Include authentication, a stripe billing module, and a secure dashboard.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Initialize a new project using the Antigravity template for [type of app]'

steps.title: Implementing Core AI Logic
steps.description: Inject the 'intelligence' into your app using Claude Code to write optimized API handlers that process user input into high-value outputs.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a clean, modular service layer that interfaces with the OpenAI API to perform [specific task] and returns formatted JSON data.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Implement the AI processing service in /lib/ai-engine.ts and add error handling for API timeouts'

steps.title: Automating Subscription Logic
steps.description: Passive income requires automated billing. Set up Stripe webhooks to manage user access levels based on subscription tiers.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a Stripe webhook handler that triggers on checkout.session.completed and updates the user's subscription status in the Supabase database.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Configure stripe-webhook.ts to handle customer subscription events and update the users table'

steps.title: Deployment and Edge Optimization
steps.description: Deploy to Vercel or Railway for global, low-latency access. Ensure your app is configured for auto-scaling to handle traffic spikes without manual intervention.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Provide a deployment checklist for a Next.js app on Vercel, including environment variable best practices and edge function configuration.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Deploy the current build to production and verify environment variables are correctly mapped'

pro_tips: Always build for 'one-click' setup; if a user needs your help to get started, you haven't built a passive asset, you've built a consulting trap.
Use Supabase RLS policies to handle data security at the database level, so you never have to write custom authorization logic in your API routes.
Implement a 'feedback loop' in your UI where users can suggest features; let AI summarize these suggestions into a prioritized roadmap for you.
Focus on 'Read-Only' AI outputs where possible; these are cheaper to run and easier to scale than conversational chatbots.
Always set up automated monitoring (like Sentry or LogSnag) from day one; if you don't know it's broken, you aren't making money.
content.next_steps: Once your MVP is live, spend 20% of your time on maintenance and 80% on SEO-driven content marketing to drive traffic to your landing page.
content.conversion_block: You have the tools, the strategy, and the roadmap to exit the freelancer grind and build a portfolio of passive income machines. Don't let another month pass building apps that don't pay you while you sleep. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
